    third_indices = [i for i in range(len(l)) if i % 3 == 0]
    third_values = [l[i] for i in third_indices]
    third_values_sorted = sorted(third_values)
    result = l.copy()
    for idx, val in zip(third_indices, third_values_sorted):
        result[idx] = val
    return result
